subject: labrador readiness update for Perth | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-4573
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in Perth. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-4573. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
